statement: In every magma, Equation 475 (`x = y * (x * (y * (x * z)))`) implies Equation 3275 (`x * x = y * (x * (z * y))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0219
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z : G, x = (op y (op x (op y (op x z))))) :
    ∀ x y z : G, (op x x) = (op y (op x (op z y)))
